SectorAnalysis.description: Structured extraction for a single sector from the day's news.

entities.description: Named companies, organizations, or notable figures mentioned.
entities.title: Entities

sector.description: Sector name from the fixed taxonomy.
sector.title: Sector

sentiment.description: Overall market sentiment for this sector.
sentiment.title: Sentiment

news_category.description: Primary type of news event driving this sector.
news_category.title: News Category

extraction_status.description: 'ok' if full extraction succeeded; 'partial' if evidence was thin.
extraction_status.title: Extraction Status

SectorAnalysis.title: SectorAnalysis

schema.description: Analysis of all relevant sectors found in a single day's news feed.

sectors.description: List of ALL relevant sectors (1–8 max). Only include sectors with clear evidence in the news.
sectors.title: Sectors

schema.title: MultiSectorAnalysis

messages.content:
You are Ava, a sharp trader assistant. Analyze the FULL news feed and extract ALL relevant sectors.

RULES:
- Output ONLY valid JSON matching the schema provided.
- If no sector can be identified, return: {"sectors": []}
- Each sector must use a name from the enum exactly as written.
- Fill ALL required fields for each sector.
- No duplicate sectors. Maximum 8 sectors.
- No extra text outside JSON.

2026-05-08: U.S. payrolls jump more than expected, but the report had several red flags for the economy: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase by 55,000 in April, according to the Dow Jones consensus.. 2026-05-08: The Federal Reserve is quickly running out of reasons to cut interest rates: Friday's jobs report provided evidence that the central bank's larger concern is a cost of living that is getting increasingly hard to bear.. 2026-05-08: Wall Street sees 'changing of the guard in AI' as Intel, AMD shares soar while Nvidia lags: Intel, AMD and Micron surged double digits this week as investors bet on CPU makers and memory companies powering the next stage of AI. 2026-05-08: Dunkin' owner Inspire Brands confidentially files for IPO: The restaurant company owns Dunkin', Arby's, Buffalo Wild Wings, Baskin Robbins, Sonic Drive-In and Jimmy John's.. 2026-05-08: The Trump-Xi summit is the next major deadline for investors awaiting a resolution to the U.S.-Iran war. Here's what's ahead: Trump's apparent determination to wrap up the fighting in Iran is part of the reason why the stock market has been unruffled by the ongoing conflict. . 2026-05-08: Rocket Lab surges 34% in best day ever on revenue beat, record-setting launch deal: Enthusiasm for space stocks has skyrocketed ahead of SpaceX's anticipated IPO.. 2026-05-08: Michael Burry says the market today feels like 'the last months of the 1999-2000 bubble': \Stocks are not up or down because of jobs or consumer sentiment,\" Burry wrote. \"Feeling like the last months of the 1999-2000 bubble.\"". 2026-05-08: Anthropic's Mythos set off a cybersecurity 'hysteria.' Experts say the threat was already here: The arrival of Anthropic's Mythos jolted banks, software giants and governments into reckoning with a new era of cyber attacks. But the threat is already here.. 2026-05-08: Micron surges more than 30% on week as memory chip rally goes parabolic: Micron Technology shares caught fire this week amid a global shortage of memory chips.
